productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Googly 2 White Orange Shoe
description: Heavily cushioned with air below the feet, theAir Googly shoes from nike add that extra bounce in every step, ensuring you win the game in style.Upper Synthetic leather upper with mesh for lightweight durability Full mesh tongue with mesh padded collar for snug Fit Perforated upper for breathability Gilly central lacing for customised fit Nike Air chamber on the heel cup Pull loop  at the back of the collar to carry with a rucksack Midsole Removable sockliner that can be replaced with an orthotic Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Full length phylon midsole for lightweight comfort Midsole made with Nike Air technology for maximum traction and shock absorption Outsole Durable carbon rubber outsole with conical lugs for grip on all surfaces Vertical flex grooves for ultimate traction Protruding teeth-like structures on the periphery of the outsole for great grip shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
